meta.title: RuBy, Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of RuBy, ERP/e-commerce integration (Sage X3, Odoo, PrestaShop, Shopify), data flow architecture, AI systems & autonomous agents. Master in Big Data at Epitech.

hero.title: RuBy
hero.tagline: ERP integration developer // FLOW ARCHITECT // Systems & AI builder
hero.subtitle: From order pipelines to autonomous systems, I design and connect business-critical infrastructures.

items.title: IRIS Mediaschool
items.description: Two years building technical fundamentals: software development, UI logic, data structures, and applied digital projects.

items.title: Econocom
items.description: Infrastructure operations, deployment, user support, and exposure to enterprise-scale IT environments with operational constraints.

items.title: CESI
items.description: Strengthening of software engineering principles, system design, and project architecture methodologies.

items.title: Sodilog
items.description: Design of first production-grade data flows: e-commerce ↔ ERP synchronization, API integrations, and order lifecycle tracking.

items.title: Epitech
items.description: Advanced studies in AI systems, distributed data pipelines, and autonomous agent design applied to real-world constraints.

items.title: Sodilog
items.description: Architecture of complex data flows between ERP and e-commerce systems (Sage X3, Shopify, Odoo). Design of automation layers and AI-assisted operational tools.

expertise.title: EXPERTISE
expertise.subtitle: Stack & integration
expertise.intro: At Sodilog, I design end-to-end data flow architectures connecting e-commerce platforms (PrestaShop, Shopify) with ERP systems (Sage X3, Odoo), including synchronization, reconciliation, and operational reliability constraints.

blocks.title: ERP & Data Flow Integration
blocks.description: Design of robust order pipelines between e-commerce platforms (PrestaShop, Shopify) and ERP systems (Sage X3, Odoo). Includes stock synchronization, pricing consistency, bidirectional product updates, and order reconciliation mechanisms under real operational constraints.

blocks.title: App & API Development
blocks.description: Development of integration layers between heterogeneous systems. Shopify apps (Node.js), REST APIs, and custom connectors ensuring reliable data exchange, synchronization, and traceability across ERP and e-commerce ecosystems.

agents.title: AI & AGENTS
agents.subtitle: Agent philosophy
agents.intro: In my Big Data Master at Epitech, I design agent-based systems focused on controllability, observability, and real-world constraints rather than pure autonomy or black-box behavior.

principles.title: WHY AGENTS
principles.description: An agent extends beyond scripted automation by adapting its behavior based on context and observations. In ERP and business systems, this enables dynamic handling of uncertainty, exceptions, and operational variability.

principles.title: HOW I DESIGN THEM
principles.description: I start from the business problem before selecting any technology. I define a structured loop: objective, context, actions, constraints, and observability. Then I implement using a mix of APIs, rule-based logic, and LLMs when relevant. I prioritize predictability and testability over complexity.

principles.title: REAL-WORLD APPLICATIONS
principles.description: Applied to ERP automation, data reconciliation, and intelligent routing systems. The goal is to build modular autonomous components that improve existing infrastructures without introducing instability or unpredictable behavior.

aviation.title: AVIATION
aviation.description: In aviation, precision and clarity are critical: every message must be unambiguous. I apply the same discipline when designing reliable systems and operational pipelines.

astronomy.title: ASTRONOMY
astronomy.description: Astronomy provides a perspective on scale and time. In data systems, historical information continuously influences present decisions through accumulated state.

volleyball.title: VOLLEYBALL
volleyball.description: A fast-paced team environment where timing, anticipation, and coordination are essential. Decision-making under pressure translates directly into system design thinking.

contact.subtitle: Ready to collaborate?

sections.title: Site publisher
sections.content: The website rb-rubydev.fr is published by RuBy. Contact: contact@rb-rubydev.fr

sections.title: Hosting
sections.content: The website is hosted on a virtual private server (VPS). For any hosting-related inquiry, contact contact@rb-rubydev.fr

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.content: All content on this website (texts, visuals, code) is the exclusive property of RuBy. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.

sections.title: Liability
sections.content: Information is provided for general purposes. No guarantee is given regarding accuracy or completeness.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: No tracking cookies are used. Only local browser storage may be used for preferences and UX features.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.content: No personal data is actively collected by this website.

sections.title: Local storage
sections.content: User preferences may be stored locally in the browser via localStorage only.

sections.title: Server logs
sections.content: Technical logs (IP, timestamps, pages visited) may be stored for security and debugging purposes only.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: Emails sent to contact@rb-rubydev.fr are used solely for response purposes.

sections.title: Rights
sections.content: Users may request access or deletion of their data in accordance with GDPR regulations.
